revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: <includeonly>{{If ||{{{doc|}}} |<!--Do nothing--> |{{#invoke:R avoided double redirect|main|{{{1|}}}}}}}<!--|all category=comment for automatic namespace detection--></includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: <includeonly>{{If ||{{{doc|}}} |<!--Do nothing--> |{{#invoke:R avoided double redirect|main|{{{1|}}}}}}}<!--|all category=comment for automatic namespace detection--></includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]
